name: Chocolate Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
Topping:
1. In a bowl, combine sugar, cinnamon, and walnuts. Set aside.
Bread:
2. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease two 9x5x3-inch loaf pans.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour, salt, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar until creamy. Add eggs and vanilla extract; mix well. Gradually beat in flour mixture alternately with buttermilk. Stir in apples, walnuts, and chocolate chips. Pour into prepared pans. Sprinkle with topping.
5. Bake 50-60 minutes until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 15 minutes in the pans, then remove and cool completely. Makes 2 loaves.
